description: MedAide+ sample test queries covering all 4 benchmark domains (5 queries each)

Pre-Diagnosis.query: I've been having severe headaches for the past 3 days, mostly on one side of my head, with sensitivity to light and nausea. Should I be worried?
My blood pressure reading at home was 145/92. I'm 52 years old and don't take any medications. Which doctor should I see?
I have type 2 diabetes and high cholesterol. What is my risk of having a heart attack in the next 10 years?
What does it mean when my urine is dark brown colored? Is this normal?
I'm experiencing sudden chest pain radiating to my left arm, shortness of breath, and dizziness. What should I do immediately?

Diagnosis.query: My HbA1c came back at 7.8%, fasting glucose 145 mg/dL, and creatinine 1.3 mg/dL. What do these results mean and what should I do?
I have recurring fatigue, joint pain, a butterfly-shaped rash on my face, and sensitivity to sunlight. What could this be?
Why do I always feel more tired in the morning even after 8 hours of sleep? What causes this?
My thyroid TSH is 8.5 mIU/L and free T4 is 0.6 ng/dL. Can you explain what this means?
I have abdominal pain after eating fatty foods, right upper quadrant pain, and occasional vomiting. Can you help me understand what might be wrong?

Medication.query: I'm currently taking metformin 1000mg twice daily and my doctor wants to add lisinopril 10mg for my blood pressure. Are there any interactions I should know about?
What is the correct dosage of ibuprofen for a 70-year-old with mild arthritis pain? Are there any kidney-related concerns?
I'm allergic to penicillin. What antibiotics can I safely take for a bacterial infection?
I'm taking warfarin and my doctor prescribed fluconazole for a fungal infection. Is this safe?
Can you review my current medications: atorvastatin 40mg, metoprolol 50mg, aspirin 81mg, and pantoprazole 40mg? Are there any concerns?

Post-Diagnosis.query: I had a heart attack 3 weeks ago and was just discharged. What exercise should I be doing now and how do I gradually increase my activity?
I was diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes 2 months ago. What dietary changes should I make and how can I track my progress?
I'm feeling very anxious and depressed after my breast cancer diagnosis. How do I cope with this emotionally?
I had knee replacement surgery 6 weeks ago. When can I return to normal activities and what exercises should I be doing?
I completed chemotherapy 3 months ago. When should I schedule my follow-up scans and what symptoms should prompt me to call my oncologist?
